---
title: "Prevalence of tonsillar human papillomavirus infection in low-risk individuals without cancer"
date: 2025-06-03
author:
  - name: Silva, Jéssica Boscariol Da
  - name: Silva, Aline Oliveira
  - name: Sacoman, Luciana Reis Rosa
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Frizzarini, Ronaldo
  - name: Moyses, Raquel Ajub
  - name: Levi, José Eduardo
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "einstein (São Paulo)"
  volume: 23
  doi: "10.31744/einstein_journal/2025AO1715"
---

```{=html}

  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Prevalence of tonsillar human papillomavirus infection in low-risk individuals without cancer</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
